issuesFixed.description: Tertiary button was not pinned to the bottom of the content half. justify-between had been removed in REV3 because it wasn't working then (no explicit card height). Now that the image half has aspect-[4/3], it sets the row height on desktop and the content half stretches to match, so justify-between is effective.
issuesFixed.fix: Restored `justify-between` to the content half div (line 58). The mb-6 on the text group is retained for mobile where the aspect-ratio-driven height may not provide enough extra space for justify-between to distribute.

validationResults.notes: All warnings pre-existing in other blocks.

output.screenshotNotes: 1440px screenshot confirms VIEW EVENT button is pinned to the bottom of the content half on desktop, with title, venue, and excerpt text at the top.
